title: Ghost in Code – Cinematic Black & White Cyberpunk Chiaroscuro Portrait
fullPrompt:
A high-contrast, black and white cinematic portrait of a woman’s face emerging from a pitch-black background. Vertical columns of glowing white digital code, cryptic symbols, and glitch-style typography cascade over her features, following the contours of her face. The lighting is dramatic Chiaroscuro, highlighting her intense eyes and lips while leaving the rest in deep shadow. 8k resolution, hyper-detailed skin texture, digital cyberpunk aesthetic, shot on 85mm lens, sharp focus, ethereal and mysterious atmosphere."
​Breakdown of Key Elements
​If you want to tweak the result, here are the levers you can pull:
​The Subject: You can specify the ethnicity or expression (e.g., "an African woman with a stoic expression" or "a cybernetic entity").
​The Code: To get that specific look, use terms like "falling data stream," "binary rain," or "matrix code overlay." You can also change the color from white to "neon emerald" or "electric blue."
​The Lighting: Use "rim lighting" or "low-key lighting" to ensure the background stays perfectly black and the focus remains entirely on the face.
​Technical Style: Adding "Double exposure effect" or "Photographic glitch art" will help the AI understand the blending of the human face with digital elements.

title: Fading Into Light – Cinematic Disintegration Portrait in Golden Crescent Aura
fullPrompt: Create an ultra realistic photo with 8k sharp details, cinematic quality, high-contrast dramatic lighting, digital painting aesthetic with photo-realistic rendering of the man in the attached photo. Copy his face and hair 100%, do not change any of the facial feature. A man positioned in a full-body side profile facing right. Half of his body is vanishing into super thick, cloud-like, grey smoke with large yellow dust particles. His half body became invisible, including his hands, feet, torso and part of his hair. Remember to add heavy amount of cloud-like smoke with the yellow dust particeles. He is dressed in casual, modern street-wear. A light grey crewneck tshirt, a cargo pants of a similar light, neutral color, and a pair of light-colored high-top boots. He wears a watch on his left wrist. He stands with his body slightly slumped, head bowed, and eyes looking down. His hands are loosely placed at his sides. The overall emotion is one of introspection and deep sorrow, The setting is minimal and stark, concrete surface or a desolate, paved area meets a uniform light, overcast and heavily clouded sky at the horizon line. The background is simple to keep the focus on the subject. The man is caught in a moment of disintegration. A massive, glowing Crescent/C-shape aura is positioned behind and slightly around him, emitting a bright, almost firey, golden-white light that looks like swirling plasma. The subject's body is being actively consumed by this heavy, super thick, cloud-like, with glowing dust. Half of his body are turning into glowing particles/dust making his arm, shoulder, torso, and lower body appear transparent. The effect suggests he is vanishing. Almost half of his body became transparent particularly his left arm, shoulder, torso and legs. Remember to add heavy amount of cloud-like smoke with the yellow dust particeles. The lighting is high-contrast and dramatic. The primary light source comes from the luminous ring/aura behind him, acting as a powerful rim light and backlight emphasizing his silhouette and the texture of the dust. The color palette is nearly monochromatic, dominated by light greys, whites, and the stark golden-yellow/amber glow of the energy effect. The figure is placed slightly off-center, but the dominant circular shape of the aura acts as a strong frame that centers the viewer's eye on the man's profile and the point of contact between him and the energy. The verticality of the man is contrasted by the powerful curve of the energy ring. The image uses a shallow depth of field for a focused look, though the overall look is more like a detailed digital painting. The effect uses techniques like dispersion/splatter (particle effects) and light manipulation (glow/bloom).

title: Blueprint Autumn – Cinematic High-Fashion Collage Portrait with Architectural Overlay

The composition features an explosive, splattered edge effect with charcoal and white paint strokes. Scattered hyper-realistic orange autumn maple leaves drift around her neck and hair.She wears a thick, textured brown knit scarf.
